name: Go2 Navigation (Humble)
postCreateCommand: rm -rf build/ install/ log/ && sudo apt-get update && rosdep update && rosdep install --from-paths src --ignore-src -r -y --skip-keys 'unitree_go unitree_api'
postStartCommand:
echo '
[Dev Container ready] Build the workspace:
  source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash
  colcon build --symlink-install --cmake-args -DROS_EDITION=ROS2 -DHUMBLE_ROS=humble -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON

If build fails with CMake cache errors (switching from distrobox), clean first:
  rm -rf build/ install/ log/
'
